title: Purpura Skies: C&C GUI
description: A cottagecore GUI overhaul made for the Purpura Skies: Covens & Cottages modpack.
body:
A cottagecore GUI overhaul made for the **Purpura Skies: Covens & Cottages** modpack. [Join our discord!](https://discord.com/invite/3sTwk597QD) ![menu screen preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P2NLzhMp/images/ae80f203a7f8e5722de6b0861233802ec1349ec6.png) _In-game screenshot credits include Biomes O' Plenty biome lavender fields and Complementary shaders._ Created for 1.16.5, with plans for future version compatibility in the works! Currently supported mods:
Spoiler - Appleskin - Better advancements - Cosmetic armor reworked - Curios - Diet - Eanimod (genetic animals) - Enigmatic legacy - Fantasy furniture - Farmers delight - Farmers respite - Feywild - Fins - Grapple mod - Growthcraft (apiary, cellar, and milk guis) - Hotchicks (click for hot chicks) - Ice and fire - Iron chest - Item collectors - JEI - JER (just enough resources) - Kobolds - Many ideas core - Multibeds - Mystical agriculture - Natural decor mod - Nutritional balance - Nyf's quiver - Patchouli - Polymorph - Quark - Relics - Simplerpc - Simply cats - Snail mail - Sophisticated core - SWEM - Toolbelt - Waystones - Xaero's minimap
Upcoming mod support, suggestions welcomed:
Spoiler - Rechiseled - Roots classic - Skiing mod - Storage drawers - Supplementaries - Tinkers' construct - Turtlemancy - Zetter gallery
